sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires RecoveryContinuationToken handoff for interrupted continuation but leaves serialization of same-shell binding fields open.
decisionTaken: RecoveryContinuationEnvelope must bind requestSeedRef, routeFamilyRef, routeIntentRef, PatientNavReturnContract, PatientShellConsistencyProjection, shellContinuityKey, selectedMobileStep, PatientActionRecoveryEnvelope, and a recoveryTupleHash.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: These fields are enough to reopen the same shell and same request lineage without trusting stale URL params or client cache.
operationalRisk: If recovery tokens omit shell continuity fields, mobile callers can be dropped to a generic home route and lose evidence context.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Extend 192_recovery_continuation_envelope.schema.json and the same-shell recovery matrix before adding new interruption classes.
